title: NVS Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: NVS Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti Result 2026 declared for Class 11 Admission Entrance Test on the official website - navodaya.gov.in on 11th May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026.

content.text: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has officially released the NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026 for the current academic session in online mode. The result has been published for candidates who appeared in the Class 11 Lateral Entry/Admission Test and is now available through the official portal. Students can now check their selection status and download their scorecard using their roll number and date of birth as login credentials.

NVS Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - navodaya.gov.in. Candidates can check their NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026 by visiting the official result link, entering their details, and downloading the provisional result for future reference. After downloading the result, students are advised to carefully verify their personal details, marks, and category information, and contact Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti in case of any discrepancy.

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has released the Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026 for the ongoing academic session in online mode at navodaya.gov.in. The result covers candidates who appeared in the Class 11 Lateral Entry/Admission test, and students can now access their selection status and marks using their roll number and date of birth. Students can download their provisional result online and use it for reference during further admission and document verification rounds.

Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti has activated the direct link to check the NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026 on the official result portal. Candidates who appeared in the Class 11 Admission Test can view or download their result instantly by using the direct link and entering their roll number and date of birth. Students should use the official result page only and keep a copy of the downloaded result for document verification and admission purposes.

sections.heading: How to Check NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026

content.text: Follow the steps given below to check and download the NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026 in online mode:

items: Visit the official Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti website - navodaya.gov.in or the official result portal.
On the homepage, look for the link titled 'NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026' or 'JNVST Class 11 Result 2026'.
Click on the result link and you will be redirected to the NVS Class 11 result login page.
Enter your roll number and date of birth exactly as mentioned on your admit card.
Click on the 'Submit' or 'Login' button to proceed and view your result on the screen.
Check your marks, selection status, and other details displayed in the result/scorecard carefully.
Download the result PDF or take a printout of the NVS Class 11 Admission Exam Result 2026 for future admission and document verification use.
